metadata.title: Original Character Generator for Writers and RPGs
metadata.description: Create a reusable original character profile with personality, conflict, story hooks, and a visual prompt. Free, no sign-up, works in your browser.
metadata.keywords: OC generator, original character generator, OC profile generator, RPG character generator, character creator, OC ideas

ui.title: Original Character Generator
ui.subtitle: Build a character you can keep writing with.

faq_items.title: What is an OC generator?
faq_items.description: An OC (original character) generator turns a world, a role, and a few constraints into a ready-to-write character with personality, conflict, story hooks, and a visual prompt.

faq_items.title: Do I need to sign up?
faq_items.description: No. You can generate original characters anonymously up to the daily free quota. Sign in to keep generating beyond it.

faq_items.title: Are my characters saved?
faq_items.description: Generated profiles are saved only in your browser (localStorage). They never leave your device unless you export or copy them.

faq_items.title: Can I lock fields I like?
faq_items.description: Yes. Lock any field and reroll the rest — locked values stay exactly as they are while everything else gets a fresh take.

faq_items.title: Can I keep writing with this character?
faq_items.description: Yes. Continue into the Backstory, Story, or D&D Backstory generators and your character is loaded automatically as a starting point.
